text.message: So bad and he’ll have road
Not that it’s a large number but no 3s
Yeah he had the two devs
Well to OJ it’s red. To us it’s OJ
You guys both don’t want to grab road
Just one theee is all I want
like look at the board man
Like you’re purposely not connecting lol
Ok and that would match OJ
Which is more than anyone else
Not connecting and playing dumb is so funny
you good at the table talk red imma give y that
You still have 3 more the other way
Dw I’m not close to a settlement
Yeah but black needs to city and then settle
Oh look. OJ got road! Who could have seen that!
We’re so stupid for robbing him
still puts me on 8 and have to fight
You’re making me root for red
I have a knight to agro too
I just drew my knight. You haven’t played any of your devs
Don’t act like you don’t have 2 VPs lol
i'm not but i have to fight for road and city
One city wins it for you
I need city and settle so it’s not me
and my path to that is... not close
Not sure if that hurt me but had to
don't know why you didn't go toward the 9 instead
You guys have the other two
And you all have it and I have my RB
But Oj got there in the end
